Package index

Fine-mapping pipeline

Core functions for running the fine-mapping pipeline

finemap_loci()
Fine-map multiple loci
finemap_locus()
Run echolocatoR pipeline on a single locus

Utilities

check_echoverse_setup()
Check echoverse setup
check_genome()
Check genome build
batapply()
echolocatoR-themed progress bar
check_deprecated()
Check deprecated arguments
